results.name: Cookie creation round-trip
results.notes: Set-Cookie with __session, HttpOnly, Path=/; cookie len=1815

results.name: proxy allows authenticated requests
results.notes: GET /login with cookie → status=307, location=/, redirects-to-home=true (proxy's handleValidToken triggered redirectToHome)

results.name: verifySession returns decoded claims
results.notes: uidMatch=true, emailMatch=true, claim-keys=[aud,auth_time,email,email_verified,exp,firebase,iat,iss,source_sign_in_provider,sub,uid,user_id], role-claim=(missing — expected; set in 02-04)

results.name: signOut revokes + clears
results.notes: POST /api/auth/logout → status=200, clear-cookie=__session=<REDACTED-0chars>; Path=/; Expires=Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT; HttpOnly; SameSite=Lax
